description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages, build and test, using a global cache that stores the node_modules/ directory. In the build stage add a job named build that runs on the node:10 Docker image with tags docker and shared, caches node_modules/, stores it as an artifact that expires in one week, and executes the shell command npm install. In the test stage add a job named test that runs on the redis:4 Docker image with tags docker and shared, runs a before_script that updates apt, installs curl, downloads and runs the nvm install script, sources nvm, installs Node 10, and then runs npm test. Also in the test stage add a job named validate that uses the node:10 image with tags docker and shared and runs the command npm run validate. No special rules or deployment targets are defined.
